zh.Lismore, County Waterford, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德利斯莫
zh.Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾曼諾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Barri於大約1130年出生時，他的父親William de Barri I36歲，母親Angharad de Windsor27歲。他與Miss FitzTancred結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1199年在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德利斯莫享年71歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.Lismore, County Waterford, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德利斯莫
zh-hans.Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾曼諾比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip de Barri于大约1130年出生时，他的父亲William de Barri I36岁，母亲Angharad de Windsor27岁。他与Miss FitzTancred结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1199年在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德利斯莫享年71岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Arabic: derivative of the placename Badr near Medina in Saudi Arabia, the location of a decisive battle in early Islamic history (634 AD ). Badr is also found as a personal name, and the surname may denote descent from or association with someone so called.
Indian: Tamil name of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Barri was born about 1130, his father, William de Barri I, was 36 and his mother, Angharad de Windsor, was 27. He married Miss FitzTancred. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1199, in Lismore, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip de Barri est né environ 1130, son père, William de Barri I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Angharad de Windsor, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Miss FitzTancred. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1199, à Lismore, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip de Barri um 1130 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Barri I 36 und seine Mutter Angharad de Windsor 27. Er hat Miss FitzTancred geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1199 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Lismore, County Waterford, Irland und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Barri è nato il circa 1130, il suo padre, William de Barri I, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Angharad de Windsor, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Miss FitzTancred. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1199, nel Lismore, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.Lismore, County Waterford, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードリスモー
ja.Manorbier, Pembrokeshire, Wales: ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアマノービエル
ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Barriが約1130年に生まれた時，父William de Barri Iは36歳，母Angharad de Windsorは27歳であった。Miss FitzTancredと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1199年にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードリスモーで71歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Barri(이)가 대략 1130년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Barri I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad de Windsor(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Miss FitzTancred(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1199년 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 리스모어에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1130–about 1199: tany ho any amin'ny 1130–tany ho any amin'ny 1199

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Barri nasceu aproximadamente 1130, seu pai, William de Barri I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Angharad de Windsor, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Miss FitzTancred. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1199, em Lismore, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip de Barri родился около 1130 г., его отцу по имени William de Barri I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad de Windsor, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss FitzTancred. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1199 г. в местности лисмор, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

sm.about 1130–about 1199: e tusa o le 1130–e tusa o le 1199

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip de Barri nació aproximadamente 1130, su papá, William de Barri I, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Angharad de Windsor, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Miss FitzTancred. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1199, en Lismore, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Gales, Reino Unido.
